question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/service/RecordFileServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: findByBlockType(BlockType block)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that 'pending', 'safe', and 'finalized' all resolve to BlockType.LATEST via BlockType.of(), causing findByBlockType() to call findLatest() for all three aliases, and if the CACHE_MANAGER_RECORD_FILE_LATEST has a short TTL, each alias triggers a separate cache lookup path that may not share the same cache key, causing redundant DB queries?
